questions.question: What was the primary purpose of the Bitcoin whitepaper, published in 2008 by an individual or group using the pseudonym Satoshi Nakamoto?
questions.hint: Understand the context of the invention of Bitcoin

questions.question: Explain the concept of the Byzantine Generals problem and its significance in the context of distributed systems.
questions.hint: Be prepared to provide a clear explanation of the problem and its implications

questions.question: What is the central trade-off that the CAP theorem presents to distributed systems, and what are the implications of this trade-off?
questions.hint: Understand the core idea of the CAP theorem and its relevance to distributed systems
